reasoning: I am voting Biswajit Das and TMC because my choice was made in December 2019, when the CAA told me I do not belong. Everything since then has only confirmed it: the rules came in March, the courts did nothing, the BJP is celebrating religion in places of power. Shantanu Thakur is standing right there on that EVM, representing a party that made a law saying my religion is not eligible. Yes, Biswajit Das switched sides—he is not ideal. Yes, I know Bangaon is likely going to BJP. But if I do not vote to keep Mamata-didi's position strong, who will say no to the NRC when it comes? Every other vote, every local disappointment, these are questions for later. This vote is for my survival.
primary_drivers: CAA as existential threat to her citizenship and belonging
Mamata-didi as the only political force saying no to NRC
Fear of BJP consolidation in her own district weakening that protection
